scripts.build: npm run build -w @kahin/qcm-domain && npm run build -w @kahin/qcm-application && npm run build -w @kahin/qcm-infrastructure && npm run build -w @kahin/shared-utils && npm run build -w front && npm run build -w api
scripts.build:front: npm run build -w @kahin/qcm-domain && npm run build -w @kahin/qcm-application && npm run build -w @kahin/qcm-infrastructure && npm run build -w @kahin/shared-utils && npm run build -w front
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w @kahin/qcm-domain && npm run build -w @kahin/qcm-application && npm run build -w @kahin/qcm-infrastructure && npm run build -w @kahin/shared-utils && npm run build -w api
